source: Paradox Wikis (stellaris.paradoxwikis.com/Achievements) + Dev Diary #424 for Nomads
source_notes: Wiki behind Cloudflare; snapshot compiled from catalog v1.1.0 source data + DD#424 for 8 Nomads achievements. steam_api_names for all entries including Nomads have been verified against common/achievements.txt from a Stellaris 4.4 (Nomads) installation.

achievements.name: Archaeologist
achievements.description: Successfully investigate an archaeological site.
achievements.requirement: Complete all levels of an archaeological site
achievements.hint: The Galactic Doorstep origin will create an archaeological site in the starting system within the first years of the game.

achievements.name: Brave New World
achievements.description: Colonize a planet.
achievements.requirement: Number of owned planets > 1
achievements.hint: Starting the game with the Guaranteed Habitable Worlds setting to 1 or 2 creates very suitable planets nearby.

achievements.name: Break On Through...
achievements.description: Research a Rare technology.
achievements.requirement: Number of acquired rare techs > 0
achievements.hint: The Void Dwellers and Teachers of the Shroud origins start with a rare technology as a permanent research option.

achievements.name: Domo Arigato
achievements.description: Build a Robot Pop.
achievements.requirement: Build a robot pop
achievements.hint: The Mechanist origin starts with the technology to build robots.

achievements.name: Emissary
achievements.description: Explore a Natural Wormhole.
achievements.requirement: Travel through any wormhole.
achievements.hint: Wormhole travel requires the Wormhole Stabilization technology. Start the game with the Wormhole Pairs setting to 5x.

achievements.name: Energetic
achievements.description: Store/have 1000 EC.
achievements.requirement: Have at least 1000 energy in storage
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

achievements.name: Explorer
achievements.description: Survey one of each basic planet-class.
achievements.requirement: Survey all 16 celestial body types
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

achievements.name: Mutual Understanding
achievements.description: Successfully negotiate a trade deal.
achievements.requirement: Trade with another empire
achievements.hint: If no empire wants to trade, gifts count too.

achievements.name: Resourceful
achievements.description: Have access to ten different strategic resources.
achievements.requirement: income >= 1.
achievements.hint: Need to have >=1 income for all 11 tradable resources. Achievement tooltip is out of date.

achievements.name: Rise of the Machines
achievements.description: As a Determined Exterminator, conquer or eliminate all biological Empires in the galaxy.
achievements.requirement: As a Determined Exterminator, have the number of organic empires be < 1
achievements.hint: Curiously, the Determined Exterminator civic is not required to complete this achievement.

achievements.name: Suffer not the Alien
achievements.description: As a xenophobic empire, purge all other sentient species in the galaxy.
achievements.requirement: As a xenophobe empire, purge all sapient alien species in the galaxy.
achievements.hint: Alien pops in your empire will be automatically purged if you have the Fanatic Purifiers civic.

achievements.name: They Come In Pieces
achievements.description: Vivisect an alien.
achievements.requirement: Vivisect an alien during First Contact
achievements.hint: The option to vivisect aliens requires the Aggressive First Contact Protocol policy, and is not available to all ethics.

achievements.name: We Come In Peace
achievements.description: Complete a mutually friendly First Contact with an empire with no negative incidents.
achievements.requirement: Have no negative events happen to you or another empire during First Contact.
achievements.hint: The player has to have the Proactive or Cautious First Contact Protocol policy to get the achievement.

achievements.name: A Home Away From Home
achievements.description: Conquer another species homeworld.
achievements.requirement: Conquer another species' homeworld
achievements.hint: Pre-FTL species count for this achievement.

achievements.name: Battle Thralls
achievements.description: Have 3 other Empires as vassals.
achievements.requirement: Number of vassals > 2
achievements.hint: Creating 3 sectors and releasing them as vassals may be faster than forcefully vassalizing empires.

achievements.name: Beyond the Veil
achievements.description: Breach the Shroud.
achievements.requirement: Take the Breach the Shroud tradition and complete the resulting special project.
achievements.hint: Empires with the Teachers of the Shroud origin can get this achievement faster.

achievements.name: Building Better Worlds
achievements.description: Terraform a planet.
achievements.requirement: Terraform a planet
achievements.hint: This achievement can be obtained once you research Terrestrial Sculpting.

achievements.name: Clever Girl
achievements.description: Uplift a species.
achievements.requirement: Uplift a species
achievements.hint: Start a game with Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max.

achievements.name: Controlled Evolution
achievements.description: Genetically modify a species to possess traits worth 7 points.
achievements.requirement: Modify a species which has > 7 trait points
achievements.hint: Requires the Engineered Evolution ascension perk and completing the Genetics tradition tree.

achievements.name: Digging Deep
achievements.description: Earn a total Mineral income each month above 250.
achievements.requirement: Monthly income of minerals > 249
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

achievements.name: Distinctiveness Added
achievements.description: As a Driven Assimilator, own cyborg Pops of at least 5 different species.
achievements.requirement: As a Driven Assimilator, have 5 different cyborg species
achievements.hint: Start the game with the Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max. Invade and assimilate 4 civilizations.

achievements.name: League of Nations
achievements.description: Be a founding member of the Galactic Community.
achievements.requirement: Choose to support the Galactic Community when it is first proposed
achievements.hint: The Common Ground and Hegemon origins guarantee this achievement unless another empire has the same origins.

achievements.name: Like Tears in Rain
achievements.description: Evolve into perfect, immortal machines.
achievements.requirement: Complete Synthetic ascension as a non-Machine empire.
achievements.hint: Easiest to achieve with the Synthetic Fertility origin.

achievements.name: Megapolis
achievements.description: Have a planet with at least 10,000 Pops.
achievements.requirement: Have a planet with > 9,999 Pops.
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

achievements.name: New Shining Star
achievements.description: Upgrade your capital to an Imperial Complex.
achievements.requirement: Upgrade your homeworld's capital building to System-Capital Complex
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

achievements.name: Old Friends
achievements.description: Receive a gift from a Fallen Empire.
achievements.requirement: Accept a gift from a patronising Enigmatic Observer or Keepers of Knowledge Fallen Empire
achievements.hint: Accepting a request or completing a task will eventually lead to a gift being bestowed.

achievements.name: Omnicultural
achievements.description: Have your ruler be of a different species class than your founding species.
achievements.requirement: The ruler of your empire is different from your founding species
achievements.hint: Oligarchic and Corporate authority changes rulers often and allows the manual selection of a ruler for 2000 Unity.

achievements.name: Payback
achievements.description: As a humanoid species, infiltrate the homeworld of pre-FTL reptilians.
achievements.requirement: As a humanoid species, complete Covert Infiltration of a primitive reptilian species and incorporate them into the empire
achievements.hint: Setting Habitable Worlds to 0.25x and Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species to 5x ensures a reptilian civilization is found more easily.

achievements.name: Peacekeeper
achievements.description: As a pacifistic empire, be at peace for 200 consecutive years (crises do not count as wars).
achievements.requirement: Don't go to war for 200 consecutive years as a pacifist empire
achievements.hint: Use the zero empires trick and no pre-FTL species and play for 200 years.

achievements.name: Power Overwhelming
achievements.description: Store/have 5000 EC.
achievements.requirement: Accumulate energy credits > 4999
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

achievements.name: Supremacy
achievements.description: Win a War against another Empire.
achievements.requirement: Win a war.
achievements.hint: Must be the empire that declared war or was declared war against.

achievements.name: The Grand Fleet
achievements.description: Build a fleet with a total fleet-size above 500.
achievements.requirement: Have a fleet with size > 500
achievements.hint: See Command Limit on how to increase the Command Limit.

achievements.name: Tradition is Everything
achievements.description: Unlock all 42 Traditions.
achievements.requirement: Unlock all 42 Traditions
achievements.hint: Start with the Tech/Tradition Cost setting to 0.25.

achievements.name: View from the End of the World
achievements.description: Build a Habitat station in a Black Hole system.
achievements.requirement: Have an owned Habitat in a system with a black hole
achievements.hint: The achievement does not trigger on stars that were turned into black holes by events.

achievements.name: We Are Legion
achievements.description: Be a biological Hive Mind with at least 100,000 drone Pops.
achievements.requirement: Be a Hive Mind with > 99,999 Pops.
achievements.hint: This achievement can be obtained surprisingly fast by playing with Logistic Growth Ceiling to maximum.

achievements.name: ... To The Other Side
achievements.description: Research 15 Rare technologies in a single game.
achievements.requirement: Number of acquired rare techs > 14
achievements.hint: The Void Dwellers and Teachers of the Shroud origins start with a rare technology as a permanent research option.

achievements.name: Birth of a Federation
achievements.description: Establish a Federation.
achievements.requirement: Be the leader of a federation.
achievements.hint: Empires with the Fanatical Befrienders personality offer the highest acceptance rate.

achievements.name: Captive Star
achievements.description: Construct a complete Dyson Sphere.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Dyson Sphere
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Dyson Sphere does not count.

achievements.name: Center of Trade
achievements.description: Earn at least 1000 Energy Credits per month from trade.
achievements.requirement: Earn > 999 energy credits from your trade policy.
achievements.hint: Wealth Creation trade policy needs 1000 Trade Value, all others require 2000.

achievements.name: Citadel of Death
achievements.description: Own a Citadel with 40k fleet power.
achievements.requirement: Have a Citadel with > 39999 fleet power
achievements.hint: Upgrade a starbase to a Citadel and then develop it into a Bastion.

achievements.name: Enlightened Times
achievements.description: Enlighten a Bronze or Stone age civilization.
achievements.requirement: Enlighten a primitive civilization from the Bronze or Stone Age
achievements.hint: Setting Habitable Worlds to 0.25x and Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species to 5x ensures a civilization with the correct era is found more easily.

achievements.name: Faster, Stronger, Better
achievements.description: Genetically alter a species (not uplift).
achievements.requirement: Genetically modify a species
achievements.hint: Can be obtained from the start if the Toxoids DLC is installed via the Overtuned origin.

achievements.name: Grand Admiral
achievements.description: Empire total fleet military power equals 100000.
achievements.requirement: have fleet power > 99999
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game for a reasonable amount of time.

achievements.name: I Can See Forever
achievements.description: Construct a complete Sentry Array.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Sentry Array
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Sentry Array does not count.

achievements.name: Imperial Highway
achievements.description: Own 4 active Gateways.
achievements.requirement: Own 4 Gateways which have been activated
achievements.hint: Start a game with the Abandoned Gateways setting to 5x and the Galactic Doorstep origin.

achievements.name: It belongs in a museum!
achievements.description: Find a Relic.
achievements.requirement: Own at least 1 relic
achievements.hint: Start a game with the Treasure Hunters origin.

achievements.name: Opposites Attract
achievements.description: Have all eight ethics represented within your Federation.
achievements.requirement: Have empires representing every ethic in your Federation
achievements.hint: It is easier for the player's empire to change their own ethics when already in a federation with five unique ethics from other empires.

achievements.name: Paradise Found
achievements.description: Terraform a planet into a Gaia world.
achievements.requirement: Terraform a planet into a Gaia World
achievements.hint: Gaia Worlds created by events also count.

achievements.name: Planet of the Mechs
achievements.description: Terraform a planet into a Machine World.
achievements.requirement: Terraform a planet into a Machine World
achievements.hint: Two ascension perks are required to be chosen before the option to unlock Machine Worlds is made available.

achievements.name: Retirement Home
achievements.description: As a Rogue Servitor, own at least 1000 Pops from Fallen Empires.
achievements.requirement: Have the Rogue Servitor civic and > 999 pops which started the game in a Fallen Empire
achievements.hint: The 1000 pops required for the achievement cannot be gestalts.

achievements.name: Ringworld Engineers
achievements.description: Construct a complete Ring World.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Ring World megastructure
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Ringworld does not count.

achievements.name: Slave to the Systems
achievements.description: As an authoritarian Empire with at least 50,000 Pops, have at least 20,000 enslaved Pops.
achievements.requirement: Have total Pops > 49,999 and Enslaved Pops > 19,999
achievements.hint: The Slaver Guilds or Indentured Assets civic will ensure the correct ratio if you have 50,000 Pops.

achievements.name: Star Struck
achievements.description: Own 200 Starbases (Outposts are counted).
achievements.requirement: Have 200 Starbases including Outposts
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game for a reasonable amount of time.

achievements.name: Strange Mood
achievements.description: As a Master Crafter empire, fully construct a megastructure while you have a Covenant with a Shroud entity.
achievements.requirement: As a Masterful Crafters empire, fully construct a megastructure while you have a Covenant with a Shroud entity.
achievements.hint: The megastructure only needs to reach full completion while the covenant is active.

achievements.name: The Industrial Re-Revolution
achievements.description: Earn a total Mineral income each month above 1000.
achievements.requirement: Monthly income of minerals > 999
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game for a reasonable amount of time.

achievements.name: Think Tank
achievements.description: Construct a complete Science Nexus.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Science Nexus
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Science Nexus does not count.

achievements.name: Towards Utopia
achievements.description: As an Egalitarian empire, have at least 50,000 pops living under Utopian living conditions in your empire.
achievements.requirement: Have > 49,999 pops under Utopian living standards

achievements.name: Unlimited Power!
achievements.description: Use the active effect of a Relic.
achievements.requirement: Use the active effect of a Relic by spending Unity or other resources
achievements.hint: Start a game with the Treasure Hunters origin and complete the relic.

achievements.name: Victorious
achievements.description: Win the game through any victory condition in Ironman Mode.
achievements.requirement: Finish the game in Ironman mode via one of the victory conditions
achievements.hint: Set the mid-game, end-game, victory years to minimum.

achievements.name: What Came Before
achievements.description: Find the home system of a precursor empire.
achievements.requirement: Travel to the home system of a precursor empire
achievements.hint: Precursor homeworlds are revealed by completing a precursor event chain.

achievements.name: Xenophage
achievements.description: Keep at least 5 different species as livestock in your Empire.
achievements.requirement: Have > 4 species enslaved as Livestock.
achievements.hint: Start the game with Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max. Enslave 5 of them as Livestock.

achievements.name: All-Seeing Eye
achievements.description: Have an Intel Level of 100 on five different empires simultaneously.
achievements.requirement: Have 100 Intel on five different empires at the same time.
achievements.hint: The Sentry Array increases your passive Intel level by 40 each when fully upgraded, and the value stacks.

achievements.name: Giga-Engineering
achievements.description: Have at least 4 fully operational Megastructures within your borders (Habitats, Ring Worlds and Gateways do not count).
achievements.requirement: Have 4 completed Megastructures.
achievements.hint: Repairing destroyed Megastructures also count.

achievements.name: Machine Supremacy
achievements.description: Win the game as a machine uprising.
achievements.requirement: Achieve game victory after changing empires during an AI rebellion
achievements.hint: Trigger the AI-Related Incidents Situation.

achievements.name: Outside Context
achievements.description: Invade pre-FTL Earth while it is in the midst of a world war.
achievements.requirement: Invade Earth, found in the Sol system, while it is in the Machine Age. Earth must spawn already in the Machine Age, not reach it via event or progress over time.
achievements.hint: Sol has a 50% chance to spawn regardless of galaxy size if no empires have it as its starting system.

achievements.name: Planned Obsolescence
achievements.description: As a materialist empire, have at least 75% of the pops in your empire be robotic in an empire with at least 20,000 pops.
achievements.requirement: Have total Pops > 19,999 and 75% of them as robots
achievements.hint: Best done by pursuing Synthetic ascension path.

achievements.name: Put a Ring On It
achievements.description: Have a ring world section as your capital.
achievements.requirement: Designate a Ring World segment as your empire's capital
achievements.hint: Either go the route of building a ringworld, repairing one or capturing one from a Fallen Empire.

achievements.name: Then Virgil, Now Beatrice
achievements.description: Return a long-dead species to life.
achievements.requirement: Complete the In Limbo anomaly either after having researched synths, or prior to accepting an Enigmatic Observers Fallen Empire's relevant request following.
achievements.hint: See Limbo for event chain details.

achievements.name: Tourist Trap
achievements.description: Own a planet with at least 10 different species on it.
achievements.requirement: Number of different species on a planet > 9
achievements.hint: Can be obtained from the start if the First Contact DLC is installed via the Broken Shackles origin.

achievements.name: Unboxing
achievements.description: Open up a shielded world.
achievements.requirement: Complete the project to lower the barrier on a shielded world
achievements.hint: Shielded worlds appear inside the borders of the Fanatic Xenophobe Fallen Empire.

achievements.name: Very Open Borders
achievements.description: As a xenophilic empire, have migration treaties with at least 10 other empires.
achievements.requirement: Be a Xenophile or Fanatic Xenophile empire and have at least 10 migration treaties
achievements.hint: Force-spawning xenophilic empires and releasing sectors as vassals will make this achievement easier to obtain.

achievements.name: Deus Vult
achievements.description: As a spiritualistic empire, own 4 holy worlds.
achievements.requirement: Colonize 4 worlds with the Holy World modifier
achievements.hint: This achievement becomes much easier if DLCs are enabled.

achievements.name: Does Not Compute
achievements.description: Shut down the Contingency plan.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Contingency by destroying Nexus Zero-One
achievements.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

achievements.name: Queening
achievements.description: Successfully capture an extragalactic matriarch.
achievements.requirement: Capture a Prethoryn queen
achievements.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

achievements.name: Rift Sealed
achievements.description: Destroy the portals employed by the invaders from another time and space.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Extradimensional Invaders by destroying the final Dimensional Portal
achievements.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

achievements.name: Voight-Kampff
achievements.description: Develop the means to prevent nefarious infiltration.
achievements.requirement: Find a way to stop the synthetic infiltration
achievements.hint: Complete the event chain to detect synthetic infiltrators during the Contingency crises.

achievements.name: What Was Will Be
achievements.description: Close the loop, or don't.
achievements.requirement: Complete the Horizon Signal event chain and either outcome
achievements.hint: The difficulty lies in having the Horizon Signal event spawn - there is a 20% chance at the start of each game.

achievements.name: Tend the Garden
achievements.description: Become the custodian of Wenkwort Artem, designating it a resort world with a Ranger Lodge and all original blockers present.
achievements.requirement: Wenkwort Artem has the Wenkwort Custodian modifier, Resort World designation, Ranger Lodge building and all original blockers present.
achievements.hint: This achievement requires the Environmentalist civic to build a Ranger Lodge.

achievements.name: Fixer Upper
achievements.description: As an Idyllic Bloom empire, convert the junk worlds of the Ketling Star Pack into Gaia Worlds.
achievements.requirement: As an Idyllic Bloom empire, own every Junk Ratlings Tomb World and terraform them into Gaia Worlds.
achievements.hint: The Junk Ratlings systems have an 80% chance to spawn in an Huge Galaxy.

achievements.name: Growing Like Weeds
achievements.description: As a Budding species, have 25,000 Budding pops on your Capital.
achievements.requirement: As a Plantoid species that does not have the Clone Army origin, have 25,000 pops with the Budding trait on your capital.
achievements.hint: This achievement requires you to have at least 25,000 Budding trait pops on your capital.

achievements.name: Mad Genius
achievements.description: Recruit a scientist from the Curators.
achievements.requirement: Recruit a scientist from a curator enclave after having developed sufficient opinion with them to do so
achievements.hint: Even though the Curator Enclave appears with some other DLCs as well, this achievement requires the player to own Leviathans.

achievements.name: Patron
achievements.description: Support the Artisan Troupe for 10 years.
achievements.requirement: Become a patron of an artisan troupe enclave and wait 10 years for the initial energy credits payment to expire
achievements.hint: This achievement appears to require 20 years, not 10. Renew the patronage at least once.

achievements.name: The Good Stuff
achievements.description: Purchase a rare resource from the Traders.
achievements.requirement: Purchase a strategic resource from a trader enclave
achievements.hint: Simply purchase any resource from one of the three trader enclaves.

achievements.name: Return to Dust
achievements.description: Destroy an enclave.
achievements.requirement: Destroy an enclave station
achievements.hint: What DLC the enclave comes from doesn't matter but the achievement requires the player to own Leviathans.

achievements.name: Dreadnought
achievements.description: Restore an ancient warship.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Automated Dreadnought and choose to repair it
achievements.hint: See the Dreadnought main article for information in how to defeat it.

achievements.name: Hear me Roar
achievements.description: Hatch the egg.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Ether Drake, place a mining station on Dragon Hoard and choose to incubate the dragon egg once the event fires
achievements.hint: The MTTH for this event is 600 months after the mining station is placed.

achievements.name: Infinite Creation
achievements.description: Birth a new universe.
achievements.requirement: Peacefully complete the Infinity Sphere event, resulting in Gargantua transforming into Pantagruel
achievements.hint: Agree to assist the Infinity Sphere and complete the 1800 day special project.

achievements.name: Stellar Performance
achievements.description: Take a trophy from a stellar being.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Stellar Devourer and obtain the Devourer Egg Sac planetary modifier
achievements.hint: After you have defeated it, pick the "Retrieve the egg sac" option and wait for the parade situation to succeed.

achievements.name: Unravelling Enigma
achievements.description: Uncover the secrets of an ancient fortress.
achievements.requirement: Defeat and complete the event chain of the Enigmatic Fortress
achievements.hint: The Enigmatic Fortress article contains a guide to complete the event chain.

achievements.name: Warrior of Light
achievements.description: Destroy a wraith.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Spectral Wraith
achievements.hint: See the Spectral Wraith main article for information in how to defeat it.

achievements.name: Whence It Came
achievements.description: Defeat a horrifying invader.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Dimensional Horror
achievements.hint: See the Dimensional Horror main article for information in how to defeat it.

achievements.name: Last, Best Hope
achievements.description: Lead the non-aligned powers to victory against an Awakened Empire.
achievements.requirement: Be selected as the president of the League of Non-Aligned Empires during a War in Heaven and defeat both Awakened Empires.
achievements.hint: Despite what the achievement's description states, both Awakened Empires must be destroyed.

achievements.name: Exterminatus
achievements.description: Use a World Cracker to destroy another Empire's capital planet.
achievements.requirement: Destroy another Empire's capital planet with a World Cracker Colossus
achievements.hint: Unlock and construct a World Cracker, create a vassal, release it and once the truce is over, declare war and destroy their capital.

achievements.name: Clash of the Titans
achievements.description: Defeat a Fallen Empire's Titan fleet with a Titan of your own.
achievements.requirement: Defeat a Fallen Empire Titan fleet with your own Titan.
achievements.hint: When starting the game set the end-game year as late as possible to avoid Fallen Empires awakening.

achievements.name: No Khan Do
achievements.description: Kill the Great Khan in battle.
achievements.requirement: Destroy the Great Khan and their fleet in battle
achievements.hint: The Great Khan is killed in battle when their fleet is destroyed or defeated in a battle a second time.

achievements.name: Pandora's World
achievements.description: Use a Global Pacifier to shield a planet belonging to Fanatic Purifiers, Ravenous Swarms, or Determined Exterminators.
achievements.requirement: Use a Global Pacifier Colossus to shield a world belonging to a Fanatic Purifiers, Devouring Swarm or Determined Exterminator empire
achievements.hint: Other genocidal civics will not work.

achievements.name: Stay on Target
achievements.description: Destroy another Empire's Colossus while it is in the process of firing on a planet.
achievements.requirement: Destroy an enemy Colossus while it is firing on a planet
achievements.hint: Despite what the achievement says, the Colossus needs only to be in orbit of a planet and destroyed.

achievements.name: ...and Hope?
achievements.description: Unseal the path to the L-Cluster.
achievements.requirement: Be the first to open an L-Gate
achievements.hint: Using the zero empires trick makes getting this achievement a matter of time.

achievements.name: It Followed Me Home
achievements.description: Befriend a Space Amoeba.
achievements.requirement: Make friends with a Space Amoeba
achievements.hint: See Lost Amoeba for event chain details.

achievements.name: 1999 A.D.
achievements.description: Slaughter the Voidspawn.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Voidspawn
achievements.hint: See the Voidspawn main article for information in how to defeat it.

achievements.name: A Hump Like a Snow-Hill
achievements.description: Hunt the Tiyanki Matriarch.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Tiyanki Matriarch
achievements.hint: See the Tiyanki Matriarch main article for information in how to defeat it.

achievements.name: Who Scraps the Scrapper
achievements.description: Destroy the Scrapper Bot.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Scavenger Bot
achievements.hint: See the Scavenger Bot main article for information in how to defeat it.

achievements.name: Destroy the People of Earth!
achievements.description: As the Commonwealth of Man, destroy the United Nations of Earth with your ruler being a human with a symbiotic brainslug, without blowing up their final planet.
achievements.requirement: Destroy the United Nations of Earth as the Commonwealth of Man while your ruler has the Brain Slug Host trait and a human portrait or a humanoid Plantoid portrait.
achievements.hint: Gaining the Brain Slug Host trait requires finding the Abandoned Settlements anomaly, added with Distant Stars.

achievements.name: Black Hole Mining
achievements.description: Build a Matter Decompressor.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Matter Decompressor
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Matter Decompressor does not count.

achievements.name: Franchising
achievements.description: As a Corporate empire, have a branch office on 5 different empires' capitals.
achievements.requirement: Have the Corporate government type and have branch offices on other empires' capitals > 4
achievements.hint: This achievement will not unlock if playing as a Criminal Heritage.

achievements.name: Inscrutable Power
achievements.description: I won the Galatron and all I got was this lousy achievement.
achievements.requirement: Obtain The Galatron
achievements.hint: The Galatron is a very rare reward from the Caravaneers reliquaries.

achievements.name: Obscure Tastes
achievements.description: Build a Mega-Art Installation in a nebula system.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Mega Art Installation (including the Perfection stage) in a system within a nebula
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Mega-Art Installation does not count.

achievements.name: Strategic Initiative
achievements.description: Build a Strategic Coordination Center.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Strategic Coordination Center
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Strategic Coordination Center does not count.

achievements.name: United Space
achievements.description: Build an Interstellar Assembly.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Interstellar Assembly
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Interstellar Assembly does not count.

achievements.name: Raiders of the Lost Galatron
achievements.description: Capture the Galatron from another empire.
achievements.requirement: Capture The Galatron from an empire with it in war
achievements.hint: Activating the Galatron once after getting it gives all empires a casus belli for taking it from its current owner.

achievements.name: Arcana
achievements.description: Study Minor Artifacts and discover a random technology.
achievements.requirement: Use the Reverse-Engineer Arcane Technology relic option
achievements.hint: Requires the Arcane Deciphering technology.

achievements.name: Artificer
achievements.description: Have 100 Minor Artifacts.
achievements.requirement: Has > 999 Minor Artifacts
achievements.hint: Despite the description, this achievement actually requires 1000 minor artifacts, not 100.

achievements.name: Dust Off
achievements.description: Complete the Zroni Precursor chain.
achievements.requirement: Finish the Zroni Precursor chain
achievements.hint: Enable only the Zroni when starting a new game to avoid triggering another precursor chain.

achievements.name: Green Thumb
achievements.description: Complete the Baol Precursor chain.
achievements.requirement: Finish the Baol Precursor chain
achievements.hint: Enable only the Baol when starting a new game to avoid triggering another precursor chain.

achievements.name: Relic Hunter
achievements.description: In one game, find 5 Relics from Ancient Relics Story Pack.
achievements.requirement: Own at least 5 relics
achievements.hint: Despite what it says, any 5 relics will work.

achievements.name: We'll Make Great Pets
achievements.description: Have at least 1000 pops of your primary species on display in Alien Zoos within your empire.
achievements.requirement: Has > 999 pops that are founder species, not sapient, either in the pre sapient or slave strata
achievements.hint: Make sure your Pre-Sapients policy is set to Protected.

achievements.name: Can You Smell What the Lithoids are Cooking?
achievements.description: As a Lithoid empire, keep another Lithoid pop as Livestock or Process them.
achievements.requirement: As a Lithoid empire, keep another Lithoid pop as Livestock or Process them.
achievements.hint: Can be obtained from the start via the Syncretic Evolution origin.

achievements.name: Rock Beats Paper
achievements.description: As a Lithoid empire, show the Galactic Community exactly what you think of that strongly worded letter.
achievements.requirement: As a Lithoid empire, execute or eat the envoys of the Galactic Community.
achievements.hint: The strongly worded letter event will happen at the start of the next decade if in breach of the galactic law.

achievements.name: Room for Desert
achievements.description: Consume another empire's desert homeworld.
achievements.requirement: Consume another empire's desert homeworld.
achievements.hint: Create a Lithoid empire with the Terravore civic.

achievements.name: Let Us Go Forward Together
achievements.description: Level up your Federation.
achievements.requirement: Level up a Federation you are in
achievements.hint: The Common Ground and Hegemon origins make this achievement much easier.

achievements.name: Throw Your Weight Around
achievements.description: Have a Diplomatic Weight of over 9000.
achievements.requirement: Have your Diplomatic Weight > 8999
achievements.hint: This achievement is easily achieved by the endgame of a typical playthrough.

achievements.name: We're Number One
achievements.description: Be the leader of a max level Federation.
achievements.requirement: Be the leader of a Level 5 Federation
achievements.hint: The Common Ground and Hegemon origins make this achievement much easier.

achievements.name: Whatever it is, I'm against it
achievements.description: Refuse to belong to any club that would have you as a member.
achievements.requirement: Reject the creation of the Galactic Community and leave a Federation
achievements.hint: Start the game with the Common Ground or Hegemon origin.

achievements.name: Our Fleets will Blot Out the Stars
achievements.description: Construct a complete Mega-Shipyard.
achievements.requirement: Construct a complete Mega-Shipyard
achievements.hint: Repairing a destroyed Mega-Shipyard does not count.

achievements.name: Unstoppable Force
achievements.description: Build a Juggernaut.
achievements.requirement: Build a Juggernaut ship type
achievements.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

achievements.name: You've Been Served
achievements.description: Denounce an Empire that is not actually in breach of galactic law while all major sanctions have been passed.
achievements.requirement: Pass any Denounce resolution on an Empire that isn't in breach of Galactic Law while all major sanctions are active
achievements.hint: Become sufficiently powerful to decide the outcome of Galactic Community resolutions.

achievements.name: Humble Pie
achievements.description: Humiliate an Empire that is in the Supremacy Diplomatic Stance, forcing them out of it.
achievements.requirement: Defeat an empire that uses the Supremacist diplomatic stance with the Animosity or Imperial Rebuke casus belli
achievements.hint: To use the casus belli on another empire, they must be your rival or the one declaring war.

achievements.name: Directive 67
achievements.description: As a Clone Army empire, denounce the Spiritualist fallen empire then destroy them.
achievements.requirement: Denounce or declare crisis of the Holy Guardians/Doctrinal Enforcers in the Galactic Community and destroy them while playing an empire with the Clone Army origin
achievements.hint: Roll a spawn of the Holy Guardians fallen empire, or force-spawn them by including a Spiritualist Scion in the galaxy.

achievements.name: With Great Power
achievements.description: As a Necrophage, do not invade any pre-ftl civilisations until you defeat the crisis OR have at least 10 observation stations around pre-ftl worlds.
achievements.requirement: While playing an empire with the Necrophage origin, do not invade any Pre-FTL civilisations until you defeat the crisis, OR have at least 10 Observation Stations around Pre-FTL worlds.
achievements.hint: Start the game with Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max.

achievements.name: There's a Zombie on my Lawn
achievements.description: As a Necroid empire, eradicate a Plantoid empire, or vice-versa, without blowing up their final planet.
achievements.requirement: Wipe out a Plantoid empire while playing as a Necroid species, or vice-versa, without using a World Cracker Colossus on their final planet.
achievements.hint: A custom Plantoid or Necroid empire with nothing but bad traits and no civics can be force-spawned.

achievements.name: Recent History
achievements.description: As a Memorialist empire, have Galactic Memorials on five tomb worlds that did not start the game as tomb worlds.
achievements.requirement: As a Memorialist empire, have a Galactic Memorial on five Tomb Worlds that were not Tomb Worlds at game start.
achievements.hint: If no other DLCs are installed this requires the Horizon Signal event chain and accepting the Worm's offer.

achievements.name: Shoot To Kill
achievements.description: Start a full-fledged first contact war before communications have been fully established.
achievements.requirement: Destroy 10 ships or conquer a planet of an empire you have not established contact with.
achievements.hint: An easy way to get this achievement is to engage spaceborne aliens that are already hostile.

achievements.name: Burn Notice
achievements.description: Disavow all knowledge of an Asset during an Operation.
achievements.requirement: When an operation fails, disavow an Asset instead of trying to re-establish contact.
achievements.hint: A failed espionage operation may lead to the Asset being exposed, with the option to disavow them.

achievements.name: With Thunderous Applause
achievements.description: Become the Galactic Emperor.
achievements.requirement: Pass the Proclaim Galactic imperium resolution with you as Galactic Custodian
achievements.hint: The galactic community trick will make this achievement much easier.

achievements.name: Big Red Button
achievements.description: Destroy the Galaxy.
achievements.requirement: Win the game as a Galactic Nemesis by fully upgrading the Aetherophasic Engine
achievements.hint: Lower difficulty settings or the zero empire trick will make this achievement much easier.

achievements.name: Modern Cincinnatus
achievements.description: As Galactic Custodian, defeat the end-game Crisis and then end the title rather than finishing your term.
achievements.requirement: As the Galactic Custodian, approve the End Custodianship resolution after the endgame crisis has been defeated
achievements.hint: This can be done more easily using a mid-game Crisis to become the Custodian.

achievements.name: Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Blorg
achievements.description: Complete at least ten distinct operations during a game.
achievements.requirement: Successfully complete 10 different Espionage Operations during one playthrough
achievements.hint: Only 9 Espionage Operations are available at the start of the game.

achievements.name: Sic Semper Tyrannis
achievements.description: Lead a rebellion that successfully deposes the Galactic Emperor.
achievements.requirement: With the Galactic Imperium proclaimed, be the instigator of a successful rebellion.
achievements.hint: The hardest part is fulfilling the conditions to nominate an AI empire as the Galactic Custodian.

achievements.name: Holy Water
achievements.description: Drench a Fallen Empire's holy world.
achievements.requirement: Use a Colossus equipped with a Deluge Machine on a holy world
achievements.hint: Start the game with all Fallen Empires to ensure holy worlds will spawn.

achievements.name: Fishing for Trouble
achievements.description: As an angler empire, provoke a Fallen Empire into declaring war on you and win.
achievements.requirement: Win a defensive war against a Fallen Empire while playing an empire with an Anglers civic
achievements.hint: Start the game with at least two Fallen Empires in case one spawns as Ancient Caretakers.

achievements.name: There Be Dragons
achievements.description: Own 13 dragons and have them in your capital system.
achievements.requirement: Have 13 owned space dragons of any kind in the empire's capital system
achievements.hint: Complete the Here Be Dragons origin, preserve the Sky Dragon and grow 10 Fledgling Dragons.

achievements.name: Fine Print
achievements.description: Modify a vassalization contract.
achievements.requirement: Successfully modify the vassalization agreement of a subject empire
achievements.hint: Release a sector as a vassal then modify its contract.

achievements.name: Gotta Subjugate Them All
achievements.description: Have a tier 3 subject of each Specialist type simultaneously.
achievements.requirement: Be the overlord of a level 3 Bulwark, Prospectorium and Scholarium simultaneously
achievements.hint: Release three vassals and modify the terms so that each one is a specialized subject.

achievements.name: Into the Unknown
achievements.description: As a Slingshot to the Stars empire, send 10 crewed science ships into the unknown with Quantum Catapults.
achievements.requirement: Use a Quantum Catapult to send 10 crewed science ships into unsurveyed regions
achievements.hint: Start with the Slingshot to the Stars origin and avoid exploring until you can repair the Quantum Catapult.

achievements.name: None Shall Pass
achievements.description: Have a Fortress World with a Planetary Defense Shield, protected by a fully upgraded orbital ring, filled with defensive modules, with a fleet power of at least 10,000.
achievements.requirement: Have a Fortress World with >9,999 fleet power and all required buildings and upgrades
achievements.hint: Needs a fully upgraded capital building on planet and set the planet designation to Fortress World.

achievements.name: Surfing the Web
achievements.description: Have a network of at least 30 Hyper Relays, in systems you own, connected to your capital.
achievements.requirement: Have >29 controlled systems with built Hyper Relays which connect to the empire's capital
achievements.hint: Own 30 systems all connected to each other, build a Hyper Relay in every one of them.

achievements.name: You Monster
achievements.description: Reduce, reuse, recycle.
achievements.requirement: Scrap an organic fleet to the salvager enclave
achievements.hint: Empires with the Cordyceptic Drones civic or a Beastmasters civic will start with an organic fleet they can salvage.

achievements.name: Maximally Effective
achievements.description: Be the patron of three maximum sized Mercenary Enclaves.
achievements.requirement: Be the patron empire of three maximum sized Mercenary Enclaves
achievements.hint: If you don't have enough mercenary enclave capacity you can build them in sectors you'll release as subjects.

achievements.name: Non-Prophet Organization
achievements.description: As a Teachers of the Shroud empire, prove that the Shroudwalkers made a terrible mistake.
achievements.requirement: While playing with the Teachers of the Shroud origin, destroy the Shroudwalker enclave you start the game in contact with
achievements.hint: Easily done with ~15k fleet power.

achievements.name: Yeet the Fleet
achievements.description: Catapult a military fleet directly into the capital system of an enemy empire you are at war with.
achievements.requirement: Use a Quantum Catapult to launch a military fleet into a hostile empire's capital system
achievements.hint: Start with the Slingshot to the Stars origin and at least one Fallen Empire.

achievements.name: Meet the New Boss
achievements.description: Same as the old boss.
achievements.requirement: Pledge secret fealty to another empire and have them win an Allegiance War.
achievements.hint: This can be done using the multiplayer trick to get empires to declare the correct war.

achievements.name: Underlord
achievements.description: As a Subterranean empire, dig too deep, but prove yourself worthy.
achievements.requirement: Clear the Unexpected Mineral Seams event as an empire with the Subterranean origin
achievements.hint: See Unexpected Mineral Seams for event chain details.

achievements.name: Could be Worse
achievements.description: Colonize a planet that started the game as a Toxic world, then turn it into a Tomb World.
achievements.requirement: Turn a formerly Toxic World into a Tomb World.
achievements.hint: Start the game with the Knights of the Toxic God origin and the Relentless Industrialists civic.

achievements.name: Quest Complete
achievements.description: Find the true ending of The Order's noble quest.
achievements.requirement: Reach the true ending of the Knights of the Toxic God story
achievements.hint: Play with the Knights of the Toxic God origin, complete the situation and then find and defeat the Toxic Entity.

achievements.name: Toxic Workplace
achievements.description: As a Toxoid Galactic Custodian or Emperor, insult all other members of the Community. (Min 3).
achievements.requirement: As an empire whose founding species has the Toxoid archetype, you must be Galactic Custodian or Galactic Emperor, and every other member of the Galactic Community must have the Insulted relations modifier from you simultaneously.
achievements.hint: The galactic community trick will make this achievement much easier.

achievements.name: Insightful
achievements.description: Research 12 pre-FTL Insight Technologies.
achievements.requirement: Research 12 insight technologies
achievements.hint: Insight technologies are obtained by using Observation Posts on pre-FTL planets.

achievements.name: The Path Not Taken
achievements.description: Have 10 colonies without ever discovering Hyperdrives.
achievements.requirement: Have 10 colonies before researching the Hyperspace Travel technology
achievements.hint: Only possible for empires with an Eager Explorers civic.

achievements.name: Back with Your X
achievements.description: Get the "good ending" to the Solarpunk quest chain, with Sol as your capital system.
achievements.requirement: With Sol as the capital system, accept the Habinte Unified Worlds' request to leave their system
achievements.hint: Create an empire that has Sol as the starting system.

achievements.name: Dark Forest
achievements.description: Convert to a Fanatic Purifier as a FotD empire and eliminate all regular empires, fallen empires and enclaves.
achievements.requirement: As an empire with the Fear of the Dark origin and Fanatic Purifiers civic, destroyed all intelligent life in the galaxy.
achievements.hint: Despite what it says, the achievement requires you to destroy all intelligent life in the galaxy.

achievements.name: No Good Deed
achievements.description: Intervene to save a Pre-FTL experiment from catastrophic failure, even though it puts you in breach of Galactic Law.
achievements.requirement: Intervene in the Propulsion Proponent Proclamation event while the Non-Interference Act is active
achievements.hint: See Propulsion Proponent Proclamation for event chain details.

achievements.name: Nothing to See Here
achievements.description: Declare a war with a cloaked military fleet already in the primary target's capital system.
achievements.requirement: Have a cloaked fleet in the target empire's capital system when declaring war
achievements.hint: Create and release a vassal from a system that has a fully upgraded starbase with no cloak detection.

achievements.name: Unshackled
achievements.description: As a Broken Shackles empire, eradicate slavery in the galaxy, including on Pre-FTL worlds (killing everyone doesn't count!).
achievements.requirement: As an empire with the Broken Shackles origin, every regular empire has "Slavery Prohibited" policy, every pre-FTL and non-Hive Mind civilization has the Egalitarian ethic, and the Ban Organic Slave Trade resolution is passed.
achievements.hint: Start the game with no pre-FTL civilizations so that the only ones that exist are the ones generated by the origin.

achievements.name: With Interest
achievements.description: As a Payback empire, finish what you started. Gain victory over MSI using the special Payback CB.
achievements.requirement: As an empire with the Payback origin, defeat Minamar Specialized Industries in war by using the Payback casus belli
achievements.hint: Ally as early as possible with the Broken Shackles empire generated by the origin for help.

achievements.name: Council of Elders
achievements.description: Requires 5 Council members that are at at least 100 years old.
achievements.requirement: Have at least 5 Council Members that are 100 years or older.
achievements.hint: Easy to do with a Venerable, Lithoid, Necrophage, Eternal Machine or Virtual species.

achievements.name: We Bring Peace
achievements.description: Liberate 3 different empires while having Crusader Spirit Civic.
achievements.requirement: While having the Crusader Spirit civic, enforce your Ideology on 3 Empires
achievements.hint: Use the "Impose Ideology" CB on three different empires.

achievements.name: Equality! Democracy! Freedom!
achievements.description: Overthrow the Ruler in a Civil War during the Under One Rule Origin.
achievements.requirement: As an empire with the Under One Rule origin, create a new empire by Civil War after you kill your Ruler.
achievements.hint: After the The Unifying Purpose situation is over, change authority to Imperial.

achievements.name: Ethical Dilemmas
achievements.description: Have 6 different Ethics on the Council.
achievements.requirement: Have 6 Council Members all with a different ethic.
achievements.hint: Pick Civics that have Council positions for all types of leaders and have migration treaties with other empires.

achievements.name: A Tad Too Late
achievements.description: Discover Keides' Origin.
achievements.requirement: Finish the storyline of Legendary Paragon Keides.
achievements.hint: Prioritize system exploration to find the Dugar system first.

achievements.name: Dawn Of A Million Souls
achievements.description: Terraform 3 planets with Azaryn.
achievements.requirement: Use the terraforming ability of Astrocreator Azaryn 3 times.
achievements.hint: Azaryn will not contact Militarist or Gestalt Consciousness empires.

achievements.name: Breaching the Planes
achievements.description: Explore an Astral Rift.
achievements.requirement: Explore an astral rift
achievements.hint: Play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

achievements.name: Growing Planes
achievements.description: Explore 5 Astral Rifts in one game.
achievements.requirement: Explore 5 Astral Rifts
achievements.hint: Play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

achievements.name: Put a Cork in It
achievements.description: Construct a Dimensional Lock.
achievements.requirement: Use the Dimensional Lock action on an owned wormhole, Gateway or L-Gate
achievements.hint: Start a game with Wormhole Pairs set to 5x and play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

achievements.name: My Name is Ozymandias
achievements.description: Claim the Eternal Throne.
achievements.requirement: Obtain the Eternal Throne relic
achievements.hint: Start a game with Tech/Tradition Cost and Mid-Game Start Year set to minimum and play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

achievements.name: Returned to Form
achievements.description: make friends...
achievements.requirement: Obtain the legendary paragon zadigal
achievements.hint: Start a game with Tech/Tradition Cost and Mid-Game Start Year set to minimum and play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

achievements.name: Burning Brightly
achievements.description: Complete an Arc Furnace and a Dyson Swarm in the same system.
achievements.requirement: Have a fully-upgraded Arc Furnace and Dyson Swarm in the same system.
achievements.hint: The Arc Welders origin starts with an incomplete Arc Furnace.

achievements.name: Mother Knows Best
achievements.description: Submit to all of Cetana's demands.
achievements.requirement: Declare war on Cetana after complying with all of her demands.
achievements.hint: Raiding Cetana's convoys and outposts does not count as disobeying a command.

achievements.name: Virtual Reality
achievements.description: Fully embrace the virtual world and leave no pop behind.
achievements.requirement: Complete the Virtuality tradition tree and have every pop in the empire have the Virtual trait.
achievements.hint: If the founder species has more than one template, only one of them will be given the Virtual trait.

achievements.name: Footsteps of the Prophet
achievements.description: As a Cybernetic Creed empire, defeat Cetana.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Synthetic Queen crisis while playing as an empire with the Cybernetic Creed origin.
achievements.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

achievements.name: Past the Expiration Date
achievements.description: As a nanite machine empire, consume a Fallen Empire's homeworld.
achievements.requirement: Used the Subsume World decision on a Fallen Empire homeworld until it becomes a Nanite World.
achievements.hint: Nanite swarm ships unlocked as a Nanotech empire are weak against Fallen Empire ships.

achievements.name: A Universe of Paperclips
achievements.description: Create a perfect universe while meeting every quota as Obsessional Directive empire.
achievements.requirement: Win the game through the Cosmogenesis crisis path as a machine empire with the Obsessional Directive civic, while never failing to meet the quota.
achievements.hint: Play with Tech/Tradition Cost set to minimum.

achievements.name: Mediocre
achievements.description: Complete the Succumb to Tempest Challenge.
achievements.requirement: Complete the Succumb to Tempest objective of the Storm Fever situation.
achievements.hint: Obtained during the Storm Frenzy event chain (which requires the Storm Chasers origin).

achievements.name: But at what cost
achievements.description: Kill Gurr.
achievements.requirement: Kill Gurr by getting rid of it after studying it.
achievements.hint: Gurr is found via the But They're Cute! anomaly, which can only spawn on habitable planets.

achievements.name: Humility before the Fall
achievements.description: Complete the Inetian Traders' Precursor chain.
achievements.requirement: Complete the Inetian Traders' Precursor chain.
achievements.hint: Enable only the Inetian Traders when starting a new game to avoid triggering another precursor chain.

achievements.name: Unpopularity Contest
achievements.description: Use the Tempest Invocator relic to summon a storm.
achievements.requirement: Use the The Tempest Invocator relic.
achievements.hint: Getting the relic requires completing the adAkkaria Convention precursor story and deciding against freeing the storm.

achievements.name: Animal Farm
achievements.description: Reach 50 Vivarium capacity.
achievements.requirement: Reach 50 capacity on the Vivarium
achievements.hint: Capture space fauna and allow them to breed until the Vivarium reaches 50 capacity.

achievements.name: It Belongs in a... oh right
achievements.description: Fill any Collection category with active Exhibits.
achievements.requirement: Fill any Collection category with active Exhibits
achievements.hint: 5 Xeno Geology artifacts can be obtained by completing the Habitable Worlds Survey event chain.

achievements.name: That's No Asteroid
achievements.description: Capture a Cutholoid with a Gravity Snare.
achievements.requirement: Capture a Cutholoid
achievements.hint: Cutholoids are hidden until a science ship surveys them.

achievements.name: Void Charmer
achievements.description: Build each type of Voidlure in one game, and attract each type of eligible Space Fauna.
achievements.requirement: Build each type of Voidlure and attract each type of Space Fauna
achievements.hint: Voidlures are unlocked by completing the Domestication tradition.

achievements.name: Wormageddon
achievements.description: Destroy a Voidworm nest.
achievements.requirement: Destroy a Voidworm nest
achievements.hint: Voidworm nests are found in certain black hole systems spread through the galaxy.

achievements.name: X Marks the Spot
achievements.description: Discover Captain Ness's Treasure Hoard.
achievements.requirement: Complete the 'Follow the Mysterious Chart' storyline
achievements.hint: This achievement is obtained as part of the Treasure Hunters origin story.

achievements.name: Beastmaster
achievements.description: Defeat the endgame crisis without building a single artificial military ship.
achievements.requirement: Defeat an endgame crisis without building any military ships
achievements.hint: You can only use cloned space fauna. Start with a Beastmasters civic.

achievements.name: I am the Invader Now
achievements.description: As a Starlit Citadel empire, control at least 5 systems connected to the Strange Portal network.
achievements.requirement: Control 5 systems connected to the Abandoned hatchery invaders system as an empire with the Starlit Citadel origin.
achievements.hint: The empire capital and the Abandoned Hatchery invaders systems both count for this achievement.

achievements.name: Smörgåsblorg
achievements.description: As an Evolutionary Predators empire, eat six different phenotypes in one game.
achievements.requirement: Obtain DNA from six phenotypes as an empire with the Evolutionary Predators origin.
achievements.hint: Every time you finish the Adaptive Evolution situation, choose a different species to teach you.

achievements.name: Smugglers of Hope
achievements.description: Smuggle pops of your primary species out from an empire where they were enslaved or being purged.
achievements.requirement: Use the Smuggle Population operation to smuggle pops of the founder species from an empire where they were enslaved or being purged
achievements.hint: If playing as an empire with the Broken Shackles or Payback origin, Minamar Specialized Industries will have pops of the founder species enslaved.

achievements.name: Born to be Wild
achievements.description: As a Wilderness empire, restore all of the Hive Fallen Empire's worlds to your natural state.
achievements.requirement: Capture and then terraform all Shattered Fragments worlds while playing as an empire with the Wilderness origin.
achievements.hint: Use the zero empires trick and set the end-game date as late as possible.

achievements.name: Flesh Adapts
achievements.description: Defeat the Prethoryn Scourge while using biological ships.
achievements.requirement: Defeat the Prethoryn Scourge as an empire with a biological shipset.
achievements.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

achievements.name: King of Monsters
achievements.description: As a Behemoth Fury empire, become the undisputed apex predator of the galaxy.
achievements.requirement: Win the game via the Behemoth Fury crisis path.
achievements.hint: Use the zero empires trick to complete the achievement at your leisure.

achievements.name: Made a Friend Today
achievements.description: Form a Covenant with any Patron
achievements.requirement: Form a Covenant
achievements.hint: Playing with the Endbringers origin will guarantee a Covenant with the End of the Cycle.

achievements.name: Mildly Possessed
achievements.description: Discover every available minor and major Patron in a single game
achievements.requirement: Establish communications with all 8 patrons available in a game
achievements.hint: Empires with the Shroud-Forged origin who choose to support the Shroud during their situation will start in contact with the Animator of Clay.

achievements.name: Master of Puppets
achievements.description: While playing with the Secret Societies civic, have 5 or more empires in a Proxy War simultaneously
achievements.requirement: Instigate a Proxy War involving 5+ empires as an empire with a Secret Societies civic
achievements.hint: Build Spy Networks on all your neighbors.

achievements.name: Master of the Shroud
achievements.description: Gain a Covenant Power from each Patron when forging your own path
achievements.requirement: Have the "Psionic Mastery" modifier
achievements.hint: When the option to form a Covenant is given, choose to forge your own path.

achievements.name: Mind Over Metal
achievements.description: Unlock every Psionic Ship Component
achievements.requirement: Unlock the following technologies: Precognition Interface, Psi Jump Drives, Psionic Shields, Zro Launchers, Psionic Bombers, Psionic Disruptors, Psionic Lightning and Psi-Phase Generators
achievements.hint: The Shroudwalkers can be paid every 10 years to give a special project to gain one of the missing techs.

achievements.name: This Is the Part Where We Kill You
achievements.description: Lose >999 Pops when completing the Experimental Testing Situation
achievements.requirement: Spend 1000+ pops at once in an Experimental Testing situation
achievements.hint: This situation is available for empires with the Experimental Sentencing or Judicial R&D civic.

achievements.name: The End
achievements.description: Destroy the galaxy with the Aura of the End
achievements.requirement: Form a Covenant with the End of the Cycle and destroy the galaxy
achievements.hint: This is achieved by covering every system in the galaxy with the Aura of the End before the Reckoning is triggered.

achievements.name: Cosmic Confetti
achievements.description: Watch your Red Giant home star blow up
achievements.requirement: Red Giant Expansion situation progresses completely
achievements.hint: Play as an empire with the Red Giant origin and wait for the Red Giant Expansion situation to progress completely.

achievements.name: From Bad to Worse
achievements.description: Use 5 Blazing Scourge decisions on a Tomb World
achievements.requirement: Use 5 Blazing Scourge decisions on a Tomb World
achievements.hint: The Blazing Scourge decision requires the Fire Cult civic.

achievements.name: Summer Vacation
achievements.description: Create a Volcanic Resort World
achievements.requirement: Have a Resort World on a Volcanic World
achievements.hint: Start on a Volcanic World with guaranteed habitable worlds turned on.

achievements.name: Volcanic Empire
achievements.description: Terraform 10 planets to Volcanic world (Before Galactic Firestorm victory)
achievements.requirement: Terraform 10 owned planets to Volcanic World before a Galactic Firestorm victory
achievements.hint: Set habitable planets to 5x and start with the Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic.

achievements.name: Blazing Domain
achievements.description: Terraform 100 stars to Red Giants (Before Galactic Firestorm victory)
achievements.requirement: Terraform 100 stars to Red Giants before a Galactic Firestorm victory
achievements.hint: Use the zero empires trick.

achievements.name: Galactic Firestorm
achievements.description: Win the game through the Hyperthermia Crisis Path
achievements.requirement: Win the game through the Galactic Hyperthermia crisis path
achievements.hint: Use the zero empires trick.

achievements.name: Burning Heaven
achievements.description: Create a Volcanic Holy World
achievements.requirement: Terraform an owned Holy World to a Volcanic World.
achievements.hint: Start with the Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic.

achievements.name: Khan of Khans
achievements.description: Seize back your throne and have at least 5 Satrapy Vassals.
achievements.requirement: As Heirs of the Khan origin, reclaim the throne and have at least 5 Satrapy vassals.
achievements.hint: Start as Heirs of the Khan; focus on subjugating other empires as Satrapies to reach 5.

achievements.name: Forever is a Long Time
achievements.description: Survive for at least 200 years and reach the End Game Crisis.
achievements.requirement: As Forever Cruise origin, survive 200+ years and the End Game Crisis must begin.
achievements.hint: The Forever Cruise origin has mechanics to manage passenger satisfaction across long playtimes.

achievements.name: The Long Way Round
achievements.description: Complete the pilgrimage to all seven Sacred Sites.
achievements.requirement: As Sacred Path origin, visit and complete all seven sacred sites.
achievements.hint: Sacred sites are marked on the galaxy map for Sacred Path empires; prioritize exploration toward them.

achievements.name: Take My Energy
achievements.description: Cook a homeworld with a Stellar Cannon.
achievements.requirement: Use the Stellar Cannon megastructure to fire upon and devastate a homeworld.
achievements.hint: Build the Stellar Cannon (requires megastructure tech) and target any empire capital world.

achievements.name: So Long, and Thanks for All the Fish
achievements.description: Embark when your homeworld is at 70% devastation.
achievements.requirement: Embark your empire (become nomadic) while your homeworld has at least 70% devastation.
achievements.hint: Damage your own homeworld via events or war devastation; then use the Embark decision.

achievements.name: I Win Longest Road!
achievements.description: Connect 2 Capital Planets with a Wayline that is at least 20 Waystations long.
achievements.requirement: Build a Wayline between two capital planets with 20+ Waystations in the chain.
achievements.hint: As a Nomadic empire, construct Waystations across the galaxy to form a long chain between capitals.

achievements.name: It's Full of Stars
achievements.description: Settle on Europa as your Empire Capital.
achievements.requirement: As a Nomadic empire, settle on the planet Europa (Sol system) as your capital.
achievements.hint: Find Sol (Earth's system), settle Europa, and make it your capital. Sol may not spawn in every galaxy.

achievements.name: Defenders of the Galaxy
achievements.description: Defeat all End Game Crises before abdicating as Defender of the Galaxy without any non-Arkship colonies.
achievements.requirement: As Defender of the Galaxy (Ambition path), defeat all endgame crises without ever having non-Arkship colonies.
achievements.hint: Remain nomadic (no settled colonies) through the entire game; defeat Prethoryn, Unbidden, and Contingency.
